sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42013" key="e(pta/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτά-σημος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of seven times,</tr_> in metre, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">συζυγίαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:11:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:12:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
